intro: Aeridostachya grandis, also known as Giant Aeridostachya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with traditional uses including the treatment of fever, headache, and respiratory infections, thanks to its reported anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Bioactive constituents of Aeridostachya grandis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal activities.
